programme.title: 记住乡愁-片段展播
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华优秀传统文化为宗旨，以传统村落为载体，以生活化的故事为依托，以乡愁为情感基础，以优秀的传统文化为核心，展现传统村落的自然环境、人文景观、民风民俗、乡土之物、文化积淀等。

programme.title: 收视指南
programme.desc: 中国中央电视台中文国际频道（CCTV-4）是中央电视台唯一一个面向全球播出的中文频道。《收视指南》栏目专门介绍央视的播出内容。

programme.title: 中国新闻
programme.desc: 《中国新闻》是以海外华人华侨、港澳台同胞、留学生、驻外使领馆及中资机构人员为目标受众的综合性新闻栏目。栏目由国内外要闻、中国内地经济和社会新闻、对国内外重要新闻事件的分析和评论组成。

programme.title: 今日关注
programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: 中国文艺
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华民族传统文化、播撒五千年古老文明、关注中国与世界重大的文艺活动、用精彩的电视文艺作品为海内外华人观众打开一扇精神视窗为目标。

programme.title: 今日亚洲
programme.desc: 以亚洲人的视角报道亚洲、传达亚洲人的声音、展现亚洲的进步和发展、反映亚洲与世界其他地区的互动。

programme.title: 海峡两岸
programme.desc: 节目宗旨是"跟踪海峡热点，反映两岸民意"，节目分为两个版块：第一个是"热点扫描"，主要报道当日的近期台湾岛内的热点新闻；第二个是"热点透视"，当日或近期涉台热点深度报道及两岸专家对此事的评论，并对两岸各个层面的交流交往进行跟踪报道。

programme.title: 中国新闻
programme.desc: 《中国新闻》是以海外华人华侨、港澳台同胞、留学生、驻外使领馆及中资机构人员为目标受众的综合性新闻栏目。栏目由国内外要闻、中国内地经济和社会新闻、对国内外重要新闻事件的分析和评论组成。

programme.title: 今日关注
programme.desc: 《今日关注》紧密跟踪国内外重大新闻事件、新闻话题，邀请国内外一流的专家和高级官员，梳理新闻来龙去脉，分析新闻背后的新闻，评论新闻事件的影响和发展趋势。

programme.title: 今日环球
programme.desc: 节目关注每日发生的国际新闻。

programme.title: 今日亚洲
programme.desc: 以亚洲人的视角报道亚洲、传达亚洲人的声音、展现亚洲的进步和发展、反映亚洲与世界其他地区的互动。

programme.title: 海峡两岸

programme.title: 收视指南
programme.desc: 中国中央电视台中文国际频道（CCTV-4）是中央电视台唯一一个面向全球播出的中文频道。《收视指南》栏目专门介绍央视的播出内容。

programme.title: 记住乡愁-片段展播
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华优秀传统文化为宗旨，以传统村落为载体，以生活化的故事为依托，以乡愁为情感基础，以优秀的传统文化为核心，展现传统村落的自然环境、人文景观、民风民俗、乡土之物、文化积淀等。

programme.title: 健康中国
programme.desc: 中国中央电视台中文国际频道（CCTV-4）是中央电视台唯一一个面向全球播出的中文频道。

programme.title: 环球综艺秀
programme.desc: 《环球综艺秀》邀请世界各国的优秀艺术家和文艺作品，包含音乐、舞蹈、杂技、魔术、达人创新等各种艺术形式，和中国的优秀艺术作品共同演绎，打造一个"文化共融"平台。

programme.title: 中国舆论场
programme.desc: 《中国舆论场》将通过大数据分析全媒体平台的舆论热点，并通过融媒体模式带动全民参与话题讨论。每期节目将请来相关专家现场进行专业分析、理性解读。

programme.title: 中国缘
programme.desc: 《中国缘》是国内第一档大型跨文化传播纪实故事节目。节目放眼全球，以缘为纽带，深度讲述中国与世界各种各样精彩的结缘故事。向世界展示中国形象、中国精神、中国发展，传播中华文化，展现中外文化的碰撞交融，真正做到连接中外，沟通世界。

programme.title: 新闻联播
programme.desc: 《新闻联播》是中国中央电视台于1978年1月1日创办的综合性新闻节目，是国内外观众群最庞大、影响最广泛的电视新闻栏目。

programme.title: 国宝发现
programme.desc: 《国宝发现》是一档以国宝文物和文博考古为主题的日播栏目。

programme.title: Edgar Cayce: The Sleeping Prophet
programme.desc: In the early 1900s, a modern-day prophet from the hills of Kentucky became a worldwide sensation: Edgar Cayce. He claimed to receive visions of both the past and the future while in a trance.

programme.title: Vietnam POW Escape
programme.desc: A German-American pilot, Dieter Dengler, uses survival skills honed as a child to escape a secret prison in Laos in the early years of the Vietnam war.

programme.title: The Hindenburg Disaster
programme.desc: For decades, experts believed they knew what caused the Hindenburg disaster: that leaking hydrogen ignited. But there may be more to this story. What caused the Hindenburg disaster?

programme.title: Shady Secrets
programme.desc: Some secrets refuse to stay buried. Whether it's illicit cargo in a frozen lake, a stolen masterpiece worth millions, or a brothel hidden in the shadow of the Capitol-the truth always resurfaces.

programme.title: Astonishing Feats
programme.desc: History is full of people pushing the limits. Like the man who single-handedly liberated a town during World War II. Or an epic robbery in Buenos Aires that was pulled off with zero casualties.

programme.title: The World Delivered
programme.desc: 100 years ago, shipping packages was slow, and shipping overnight was impossible, until two Seattle brothers risk everything to reinvent shipping packages for all.

programme.title: Picking Nirvana
programme.desc: In Ohio, a late friend's picking nirvana has the Wolfe brothers howling. With a successful demolition business and an eye for treasure, Brian amassed a mind-boggling collection of rare, oversize gems.

programme.title: Restored With The Garage Doors
programme.desc: Carmine and Mike's skills are tested when big-ticket items take away from the budget for renovating a Spanish-style home in Leimert Park.

programme.title: Poolside Luxury
programme.desc: Two months into their renovation, Grant and Lynsey renovate the pool area at Chiawa Camp. But heavy rains wash out the roads into camp and cause delays.

programme.title: Bernese Farmhouse
programme.desc: A dog-loving couple's home is on the newer side, but the design is starting to age. They can't decide between modern farmhouse and industrial styles.

programme.title: 30s Glam vs. 60s Cool, Florida
programme.desc: A design-obsessed couple battles over Mediterranean glam or midcentury cool in St. Petersburg, Florida.

programme.title: The Classic Detroit House
programme.desc: Keith and Evan tackle a decrepit 1920s house with original details and hidden charm. Keith combines old and new to create a city-chic throwback home.

programme.title: From Ugly To Glamorous
programme.desc: The road trip comes to an end as Retta reveals the winner of Ugliest House in America! The winning house receives a $150,000 renovation.

programme.title: Dome Sweet Dome
programme.desc: Ben and Cristi bring function and style to couple's artist-built dome house and turn it into the hangout spot of their dreams.

programme.title: Bittersweet Sale
programme.desc: After learning that a member of their team needs to sell her house in a hurry, Lyndsay and Leslie jump into action, promising to forgo any profit.

programme.title: House Of Quirks
programme.desc: An outdoorsy couple have a house with many quirks. Jen integrates orangey wood ceilings and an organic design to bring their house into the present.

programme.title: Episode 9
programme.desc: Jack continues his hunt for wild homes, beginning with a trio of wooden geodesic domes. Next, he tours a home that’s top to bottom marble.

programme.title: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jack visits a sci-fi-inspired smart home with a high-tech glow. Next, he explores an earth home built into the hillside with mid-century vibes.

programme.title: Big Bucks In Boca Raton
programme.desc: With a few windfalls in their pockets, a couple calls on David Bromstad yet again to find their third dream home in Boca Raton, Florida.

programme.title: Hot Mess Midwest
programme.desc: A concrete cave better suited for children, a former bank and an outdated brick house that looks like a pizza place compete for a $150,000 makeover.

programme.title: Well That Didn't Go As Planned
programme.desc: Unanticipated failures, schemes going sideways, and good intentions gone wrong. Life is most entertaining when nothing goes according to plan.

programme.desc: Life is full of awkward, cringe-worthy fails that we would prefer to forget, but you can't bury the memory when the camera catches it all.

programme.title: Double Twin Trouble
programme.desc: Lyndsay and Leslie help two sisters update their parents' previous home. The twins bring in another pair of twins to help with the renovation.

programme.desc: With work on the pool area at a standstill, Steph and Luke kick the garden rooms into high gear. But the garden plan hits a concrete roadblock.

programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work behind the scenes of a hotel that is built downwards into a quarry, with high-tech guest experiences and rooms with windows looking into aquariums.

programme.title: Hilltop Escapes
programme.desc: Scottish wilderness, the Welsh mountains and a hotel perched on a glacier in Italy.

programme.title: Summer
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates fennel from his garden in a succulent roast loin of pork with a fab fennel gratin, makes an oozy risotto with the freshest peas and heroes home-grown carrots in a vibrant rainbow slaw

programme.title: Stratford
programme.desc: Piers and Emma build the first new listed castle in the UK for 100 years, complete with a tower, moat and futuristic tech. It's the biggest ever Grand Design, so is even their £2m budget enough?

programme.title: Shanghai Wonderland
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work behind the scenes of a hotel that is built downwards into a quarry, with high-tech guest experiences and rooms with windows looking into aquariums.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals (S6)
programme.desc: In a 1920s-themed final, the teams create a dessert trolley adorned with sharing delights and an opulent banquet. Which team will be roaring with joy and be crowned the winner?

programme.title: DIY SOS (S34)
programme.desc: The team are in Leicester to help seven-year-old Isla, a bright and determined little girl who dreams of living more independently in her own home.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show (S33)
programme.desc: Graham Norton presents a lively chat show featuring Bruce Springsteen, Jeremy Allen White, Jennifer Lawrence, Tessa Thompson and Florence + The Machine.

programme.title: Fish
programme.desc: Award winning chef Jason Atherton continues his journey through Dubai at the beach, where he cooks up some delicious fish and seafood recipes inspired by this beautiful coastal city. He is joined by Chef Akmal Anuar, who heads into the Persian Gulf on a deep-sea fishing trip to catch fresh barracuda for his incredible woodfired recipe.

programme.title: 效廉出发吧
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: 哈罗 你有事吗
programme.desc: 见多识广老司机沈玉琳 VS. 古灵精怪新人类曾智希 说没事的，都很有事！ 说有事的，没事找事！ 生活里每件小事都是大事！ ！ ！ 跨世代观点交锋，中外文化差异对决，【找事团】突破盲肠、呛辣开喷！支援你解决人生平交道上遭遇的各种疑难事！

programme.title: Markets
programme.desc: When Bluey visits the markets with five bucks from the tooth fairy, the options are endless. But as she and Indy look for the perfect purchase, spending it proves hard.

programme.title: Blue Mountains
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: Chilli to the Rescue
programme.desc: Chilli decides to become a superhero called Super Chilli! His superhero skills are put to the test when Evil Pea covers Supertato in sticky honey. Chilli's heat saves the day.

programme.title: The Library Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels can't figure out if fish have noses, Duggee shows them his library. But when the Squirrels realise no-one is visiting it, they have an idea...

programme.title: Tag's First Day
programme.desc: The Squirrels are crafting in the Clubhouse when Betty saves Tag from throwing water across the table instead of glitter.

programme.title: Stick Time
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Seattle Space Needle, USA
programme.desc: The team goes where no Go Jetter has gone before, when Glitch tries to launch into space.

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Hailstorm
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters brand new click-on save the GoJet Academy from a glitched thunderstorm?

programme.title: Harbin Ice City, China
programme.desc: GrimHQ overheats so lands in Harbin Ice City, melting the amazing ice sculptures.

programme.title: Reese's Filipino Cassava Cake
programme.desc: Cassava cake is a very popular dessert in the Philippines and Reese is making a very special version for her friends to try they when come to visit. It's a family favourite!

programme.title: Fishing Cats
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the tropical island of Sri Lanka in Southern Asia on a global adventure in search of fishing cats.

programme.title: Meet the Pirates
programme.desc: Captain Captain doesn't think her new crew, Sandy and Seaweed, are up to the job. Unless they can both convince her that they should stay, she is going to send them back to the Pirate Agency. Sandy and Seaweed decide to write a special song all about them in order to persuade Captain Captain that they should remain as her crew.

programme.title: Flying Horse Crazy
programme.desc: Amelia is flying around in the toy shop when suddenly she notices the toy flying horse.

programme.title: Stumpfest
programme.desc: Dad and his mates hit the backyard, ready to rip up some tree stumps! But when Bluey and Bingo take over a stump as a nail salon, Dad finds he's got some negotiating to do.

programme.title: Favourite Thing
programme.desc: When Bluey accidentally makes Bingo upset playing a game at dinner, she will do anything to make her happy again - even changing the rules of the game. But nothing seems to work.

programme.title: Daddy Dropoff
programme.desc: Dad refuses to be late dropping off Bluey and Bingo at kindy and school, but the girls make Dad play so many games, they quickly derail his plan.

programme.title: Tato Tower Sleepover
programme.desc: Supertato invites Evil Pea to his sleepover, but Carrot is suspicious and vows to stay up all night to make sure she can't unleash any of her evil plans.

programme.title: The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Master of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Cool, Man
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Pizza Girls
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Noise
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are trying very hard not to make any noise. Then they make as much noise as possible during the Tubby Phone Dance.

programme.title: Best Friend Song
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing the Best Friend Song with their school friends.

programme.title: Farmyard Runaways
programme.desc: Plom is looking after some new furry friends, specifically a heard of Alpacas. But when the Poppacas end up wandering off into the unknown, Plom has to find a way to get them back.

programme.title: Dog Loves Time Travel
programme.desc: Pug wants to go back in time and our two adventurers visit an inventor who has a time machine. But each time they try to use the machine something goes wrong.

programme.title: A Night At The Circuits
programme.desc: Messy is exploring science questions. He joins his friends in OKIDO on an adventure. They explore the electrical world of circuits to fix Zoe's communicator.

programme.title: Featherwand
programme.desc: Bluey and Mum are off to Chloe's party and Bingo isn't invited. But armed with a magic featherwand that makes things incredibly heavy, Bingo can now stop them leaving the house.

programme.title: Messy-power
programme.desc: Hey, who turned out the lights? Messy goes to OKIDO and finds out electricity can lead to music, lights and disco dancing!

programme.title: White Cliffs of Dover, England

programme.title: Valentina's Greek Vegetarian Moussaka
programme.desc: Valentina shows us how to make a very tasty Greek meal. Her delicious moussaka recipe is loaded with fresh vegetables and topped with green lentils that are packed with goodness.

programme.title: River Chub
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America in search of a river chub that builds an underwater nest with over 7000 pebbles.

programme.title: Bowled Over
programme.desc: Sandy and Seaweed have invented a new game knocking down bottles with coconuts; they have called it 'Bowling'.

programme.title: Yowch
programme.desc: He-He and Krash are preparing a special tea party for Lily.

programme.title: Favourite Thing
programme.desc: When Bluey accidentally makes Bingo upset playing a game at dinner, she will do anything to make her happy again - even changing the rules of the game. But nothing seems to work.

programme.title: Daddy Dropoff
programme.desc: Dad refuses to be late dropping off Bluey and Bingo at kindy and school, but the girls make Dad play so many games, they quickly derail his plan.

programme.title: Bingo
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: Trolley Dash
programme.desc: Evil Pea causes chaos in the veggie aisle with a trolley loaded to the brim with stinky cheese. Supertato and Broccoli must use the Tato Car to get rid of the stink.

programme.title: The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Master of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Cool, Man
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: Pizza Girls
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.title: Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Noise
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are trying very hard not to make any noise. Then they make as much noise as possible during the Tubby Phone Dance.

programme.title: Best Friend Song
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing the Best Friend Song with their school friends.

programme.title: Farmyard Runaways
programme.desc: Plom is looking after some new furry friends, specifically a heard of Alpacas. But when the Poppacas end up wandering off into the unknown, Plom has to find a way to get them back.

programme.title: Dog Loves Time Travel
programme.desc: Pug wants to go back in time and our two adventurers visit an inventor who has a time machine. But each time they try to use the machine something goes wrong.

programme.title: A Night At The Circuits
programme.desc: Messy is exploring science questions. He joins his friends in OKIDO on an adventure. They explore the electrical world of circuits to fix Zoe's communicator.

programme.title: Messy-power
programme.desc: Hey, who turned out the lights? Messy goes to OKIDO and finds out electricity can lead to music, lights and disco dancing!

programme.title: Cherry Picker!
programme.desc: The town's ferris wheel is stuck, so Mojo and Bo have to get it moving. But they do their job too well, because the wheel rolls away, forcing Mojo and Bo to chase it down.

programme.title: It's time for a race
programme.desc: JoJo & Gran Gran have their own sports day with Jared and Cynthia, but when JoJo isn't fast enough to win the races, Gran Gran suggests JoJo try the egg and spoon race instead!

programme.title: Wool on Wheels
programme.desc: Scarf Lady is holding a 'knitted treats' sale in the park, but the weather is causing a problem...

programme.title: Lemon Cafe
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck discover a Lemon Cafe in the park, but it seems to be nearly closing time...

programme.title: Heart of Gold
programme.desc: Toby's passengers can't stop making fun of him, that is until he discovers two villains trying to steal King Godred's crown.

programme.title: Markets
programme.desc: When Bluey visits the markets with five bucks from the tooth fairy, the options are endless. But as she and Indy look for the perfect purchase, spending it proves hard.

programme.title: Blue Mountains
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo, Mum and Dad play a game of hand puppets, exploring the land beyond the Blue Mountains where they outsmart the Cheeky Fox to find the softest ever beds.

programme.title: The Pool
programme.desc: Packing for the pool, Bluey and Dad tease Mum about being so fussy with what to take. But when they arrive underprepared, they realise a little planning goes a long way.

programme.title: Turnip of Terror
programme.desc: Evil Pea tricks Supertato, and the Veggies, who fall into the Deli Counter and come face-to-face with the Turnip of Terror. They escape with help from the not so scary Turnip.

programme.desc: 寓教于乐的大型综艺节目「天才冲冲冲」，由徐乃麟、曾国城连袂主持。

programme.title: 食尚玩家 疯狂总部
programme.desc: 节目设下最疯狂的任务，主持群将进行任务解锁，品尝在地美食。

programme.title: Janice and Bob
programme.desc: Janice and Bob have spent decades dreaming of leaving city life behind for a peaceful home by the sea. With their daughter Sarah guiding them, they are ready to turn their coastal dreams into reality.

programme.title: A Surprise Among Friends
programme.desc: While visiting family at the beach, Theresa surprises a long-time friend with a reading, and reunites him with his deceased parents. In the end, Theresa returns home to find Victoria has yet to move out.

programme.title: The Man in the Guesthouse
programme.desc: When a young couple finds someone to rent out their garage, they're happy to have an additional source of income. But soon they realise that their lodger may not be the dream tenant that they thought.

programme.title: Orlando: Sweetbriar
programme.desc: Team is back where it all began in the Jewel Oaks neighbourhood, where Duke and Keith first flipped a house together. Will they manage to restore this nightmare from the '60s as successfully as last time?

programme.title: Lost in America
programme.desc: Grab your map and your appetite as host Michael Yo sets his sights on the best off-road eats. Buckle up as we hit the backroads for bison burgers in Alabama and Brussels sprouts behind bars in Connecticut.

programme.title: Unusual Service
programme.desc: Your table is ready and it's time to get served in the most unusual ways. Join host Michael Yo's journey to Thailand for crispy flying fried chicken, then dinner is served with a side of sassy lip service.

Five celebrity friends go on a trip together but at each stop where it costs money, they will have to play games against each other to be exempt from paying. One final loser will cover the costs for all.

programme.title: Southern BLT Dutch Baby
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece brings a Southern twist to a traditional recipe by adding bacon, lettuce, and tomato to the Dutch Baby "pancake", and serves it alongside a colourful asparagus and radish salad.

programme.title: The Man in the Guesthouse
programme.desc: When a young couple finds someone to rent out their garage, they're happy to have an additional source of income. But soon they realise that their lodger may not be the dream tenant that they thought.

programme.title: A Nurse To Die For
programme.desc: A father hires a live-in nurse to help care for his sick daughter, however, as she suffers a series of setbacks, he starts to wonder if the nurse might actually be the one keeping her sick.
Today, we'll introduce you to popular "no-interior" homes. We'll showcase the "Self-Made 3 No House," where unnecessary elements are completely removed, and the "Hide-and-Seek House".

programme.title: Lost in America

programme.title: Unusual Service
programme.desc: Your table is ready and it's time to get served in the most unusual ways. Join host Michael Yo's journey to Thailand for crispy flying fried chicken, then dinner is served with a side of sassy lip service.

programme.title: House Beautiful Cake
programme.desc: Buddy makes a cake for an old friend and the current Editorial Director of House Beautiful Magazine, Joanna Saltz. When Danny "The Mule" announces his retirement, Buddy and the gang throw a surprise party.

programme.title: Orlando: Campbell House
programme.desc: Duke is BACK and ready to flip more zombies with our expert Zombie flippers, Keith and Alynne. The team checks out a vintage property in a desirable neighbourhood that needs quite an overhaul.

programme.title: Hoisin Sloppy Janes on Bao Buns
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece kicks off this incredible meal with crispy purple yam jojos, inspired by the Pacific Northwest. Coated in oil and a seasoned flour mixture, they're baked to perfection.

programme.title: Black Eyed Pea Biryani
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece brings together Southern and Indian flavours with her black-eyed pea biryani. She sautes the peas with vegetables, spices and coconut milk, then bakes it with rice.
The celebrity directors begin donating to the piggy bank for the project, but then Na-rae reveals a surprising sum: 10 million KRW from her own pocket! What's the story behind this shocking amount?

programme.title: Judi and Tom
programme.desc: Judi and Tom have always loved boating and spending time on the water, but their large oceanside family home is no longer fit for their needs and they're looking to downsize.

programme.title: Pickleball Promise
programme.desc: A busy Theresa is desperate to plan a girls' night with her besties. While at lunch, Spirit pulls Theresa into a reading that finds a departed mom asking her daughter's boyfriend for a proposal!

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna and Leo seem to have it all: two adorable children and a beautiful house. But their perfect marriage begins to unravel when Piper arrives in town and sets her sights on Leo.

programme.title: Smart Home Killer
programme.desc: A powerful story of a mother and daughter who are held captive in their own home, and whose love and wits help them survive the impossible. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Cintaku Menyala Terus Gak Perlu Digas
programme.desc: A traumatic high school fire inspired Lista (Larasati Nugroho) to become a firefighter, all while secretly searching for the hero who saved her that day. During a rescue mission, Lista saves a young boy named Angga, who turns out to be the son of Gara (Ridho Illahi). When Gara reveals that he used to be a firefighter himself, Lista begins to wonder if she has finally found the person she’s been looking for.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Kita Yang Kampung Tapi Semesta Mendukung
programme.desc: Jali (Kenny Austin) is a handsome young man with a secret: he hasn't been circumcised. Worried about his son’s future, his father, Babe Hai, comes up with a desperate plan to tie Jali to his bed and calls for a doctor. Enter Nadia (Jennifer Eve), a beautiful young doctor new to the village health clinic. Her presence causes a sensation, and she quickly goes viral, leading to a crowd of local men suddenly faking illnesses just to get a check-up from her.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cintaku Menyala Terus Gak Perlu Digas
programme.desc: A traumatic high school fire inspired Lista (Larasati Nugroho) to become a firefighter, all while secretly searching for the hero who saved her that day. During a rescue mission, Lista saves a young boy named Angga, who turns out to be the son of Gara (Ridho Illahi). When Gara reveals that he used to be a firefighter himself, Lista begins to wonder if she has finally found the person she’s been looking for.

programme.title: DARI PADA DICUBIT IGUANA, LEBIH BAIK DICUBIT KAMU
programme.desc: To pursue her dream of becoming a singer, Pipit (Larasati Nugroho) always performs wearing a mask. Not only is she shy, but her father also forbids her from entering the music industry. At campus, Pipit-who works as a duck herder-is constantly bullied by everyone except for Feri (Ridho Ilahi).

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cuma Mau Bilang, Tipis Tipis Kep!
programme.desc: Seeking revenge on her ex, Rendy (Eduard Sidik), Violla successfully ruins his event with the help of a man she hired as her fake boyfriend. However, the plan backfires in a sweet way as Violla finds herself becoming genuinely attached to Tristan (Fendy Chow), her 'rented' partner.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: DARI AKI BUAT KAMU
programme.desc: Pandu and Tita have been dating since college, but even after graduating, Tita is too scared to introduce Pandu to her family. Her parents strictly forbid her from dating because her late grandfather had already arranged for her to marry another man.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Sampahnya Dipungut Perasaanku Keangkut
programme.desc: Hana (Shanice Margaretha) works hard as a garbage collector, driving a three-wheeled motor cart every day. Her life changes when she bravely saves a young girl named Chika (Firzanah Alya) from a kidnapping attempt. Grateful for her bravery, Chika’s wealthy father, Adit (Fendy Chow), immediately hires Hana to be his daughter's full-time nanny.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mba Chicken Wings Senyumnya Sederhana Tapi Bikin Warga Marah
programme.desc: Desperate to escape an arranged marriage with Kelvin, Dinda (Jennifer Eve) runs away from home. While being chased by her father’s men, she spots an open car and hides inside. Little does she know, the car belongs to Baim (El Ryan Carlen), who happens to be Kelvin's best friend. Now, Dinda must navigate her feelings while staying hidden from those searching for her.

programme.title: Status Palsu Cintamu Menyala Abangkuh
programme.desc: Radit (Fendy Chow) runs away from home and is chased by his brother. Radit accidentally entered Rhea's (Yuriska Patricia) room to hide. Rhea, who was holding an engagement at her house, suddenly entered the room and shouted to see Radit.

programme.title: CINTA JUMBO MAS BAKSO
programme.desc: Hendra is a wealthy heir who defies his father by choosing to sell meatballs (bakso) instead of running the family empire. While preparing for a major festival, he is hit by a motorcycle carrying Ratna (Michelle Ziudith), a curvy girl with a huge appetite for meatballs. To Hendra’s fury, Ratna’s boyfriend whisks her away without apologizing. However, fate brings them together again when they cross paths at the very festival Hendra is competing in.

programme.title: PL Moments 2025/26
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Burnley have won just one of their last nine home league games against Brighton (D5 L3), beating them 1-0 in December 2018 under Sean Dyche.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Brentford beat Everton 4-2 in January’s reverse fixture, ending a six-game winless run against the Toffees in the Premier League (D3 L3).

programme.desc: A complete review of all the day’s Premier League football, with highlights and studio discussion. The Saturday Wrap broadcasts immediately after Premier League Live on Saturday.

programme.desc: Late last year PL Stories travelled to Dubai to spend time with Victor Moses, reflecting on a life and career shaped by resilience and determination. programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Atonement
programme.desc: Mickey makes a big mistake in her hunt for the killer, but her family helps to right the problem. A major showdown unites the neighborhood but turns deadly.

programme.title: Unearth
programme.desc: Two jurors for a mafia trial are gunned down, the team jumps into an organized crime investigation.

programme.title: The Vow
programme.desc: When a toddler is found at the scene of a crime, John and Bailey must decide whether to let the child go to a shelter for the night or care for her themselves. Meanwhile, Tim dissapears when someone from his past returns and leaves Lucy in the dark.

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 香港爱情故事
programme.desc: 暖男设计师陈子朗(罗天宇饰)与理想主义女友邱凯琪(龚嘉欣饰)，是香港典型因土地问题而被迫流离浪荡的情侣。子朗两位妹妹陈子欣(王敏奕饰)和陈子婷(游嘉欣饰)性格极端，摄影师子欣沉沦于艺术家纪家希(谢东闵饰)的失乐园；品学兼优的大学女神子婷，爱之初体验以现实先行，两姐妹各有恋事。子朗、凯琪为觅安乐窝打拼，新婚后居于百多呎的劏房，除了要面对空间不足的生活磨擦外，还要处理双方父母的暮年感情危机！小两口排除万难，置业美梦却一夜变噩梦，为了一层楼竟忘记如何好好恋爱……_x000D_

programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 香港爱情故事
programme.desc: 暖男设计师陈子朗(罗天宇饰)与理想主义女友邱凯琪(龚嘉欣饰)，是香港典型因土地问题而被迫流离浪荡的情侣。子朗两位妹妹陈子欣(王敏奕饰)和陈子婷(游嘉欣饰)性格极端，摄影师子欣沉沦于艺术家纪家希(谢东闵饰)的失乐园；品学兼优的大学女神子婷，爱之初体验以现实先行，两姐妹各有恋事。子朗、凯琪为觅安乐窝打拼，新婚后居于百多呎的劏房，除了要面对空间不足的生活磨擦外，还要处理双方父母的暮年感情危机！小两口排除万难，置业美梦却一夜变噩梦，为了一层楼竟忘记如何好好恋爱……_x000D_

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(畲诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 阖府统请
programme.desc: 德（王喜）天生厨艺天份，在舅父季（刘家辉）鼓励下，欲投身饮食行业，唯其父坚（梁家仁）却断言不允。德无奈放弃，为此郁郁不乐，幸得青梅竹马好友琳（袁洁莹）在旁开解。经多番努力，德终获坚批准，进入一酒店中菜部学厨，期间德邂逅咏（郭可盈），力加追求，终以真诚打动之，琳得悉黯然失落。_x000D__x000D_一次偶然，德结识酒店太干爷豪（魏骏杰），成为好友。二人与另一好友礼（张兆辉）雄心壮志，合力经营食肆，意外地闯出名堂。此时，德向咏求婚，咏不欲承担冢庭重任，毅然与德分手。德失落，琳加以扶持，二人终开展一段真挚的感情。德声名日噪，豪因觉地位被忽略而渐生妒忌，竟萌损德之念。究竟德又如何应付呢？

programme.title: 阖府统请

programme.title: Katanya Kamu Suka Modus, Affah Iya?
programme.desc: Farel's car was confiscated and made Farel have to go everywhere by motorcycle. On the road, Farel meets Alin who is in a hurry and suddenly gets on his motorcycle but Farel's motorcycle breaks down. Alin and Farel meet again on campus because Farel is accused of peeping in the women's restroom.

programme.title: Abang Layang Layang Gamonin Ayang
programme.desc: The endless bickering between Hardi Fadhillah and Josephine Firmstone shows no sign of stopping. Hardi is obsessed with chasing fallen kites, but he constantly runs into Josephine, a kite vendor who sees his hobby as a threat to her business. It’s a hilarious tug-of-war between a man chasing his passion and a woman protecting her livelihood.

programme.title: THE SULTAN

programme.title: Bang Angkot Please Do Your Magic

programme.title: Cinta Suci Gadis Keong Mas

programme.desc: Makoto and Shiki stop in Orbit, where they meets Lana and Eto. They seek help against thieves threatening their village.

programme.title: The Heroes Are A Couple Of Beauties
programme.desc: Talented high schooler Hibiki is summoned as a hero to fight demons, while another hero, Tomoki, appears in Gritonia Empire.

programme.title: Summer Demon
programme.desc: Nico and her familiars take a summer trip to the land of the ancient retainers, following Ibuki's prophecy.

programme.title: Miharu Kiryu, The Vampire / Missing Parasol / I'm So Glad You're Here
programme.desc: Vampire Miharu Kiryu joins the Otogi household. He’s a night owl living on Morihito’s energy and brings more chaos.

programme.title: We Got Trapped In A Death Game… (But It Sucked) / Long Long A Go Go
programme.desc: Morihito, Kanshi, Keigo, and Miharu wake in a room with masks, forced by Zigzag into a deadly game to save Nico.

programme.title: Kara And Shiki / Mega Marble Mania Madness / Scramble Scrap Squad
programme.desc: Nico and Kukku help at the shrine. Nico’s paper cat moves, but Kara’s ‘bird’ is so bad it looks more like a "Shikigami".

programme.title: Yuki Was My First Love
programme.desc: Winter break is over and a new term is here, but Kyo and Yuki still cannot get along despite Tohru wishing for them to.

programme.title: It’s Valentine’s, After All
programme.desc: Kyo tries unsuccessfully to flee from Valentine's Day in school and meets the source of his fear, Kagura, on his way home.

programme.title: This Is A Wonderful Inn
programme.desc: With the end-of-term tests over, Momiji invites Tohru, Yuki and Kyo to a hot springs inn owned by the Somas for White Day.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十六集 人是在一瞬间长大的 罗曼瞬间长大。想起陈勉的医生表弟方驰，顾不得和陈凯西还在冷战，一个电话打过去，陈凯西让她立刻带上病历和检查报告来医院。医院大厅，罗曼见陈凯西如见亲人，方驰细致周到提醒罗曼注意事项，忙完后罗曼定下神才想起问陈凯西，你来医院干什么？陈凯西说，我怀孕了。罗曼大喜。陈勉得知陈凯西怀孕也十分开心，但约好陪陈凯西产检，他还是缺席了。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十七集 今年的冬天格外冷 罗曼忍不住打给陈凯西，深夜的医院门口小旅馆，陈凯西带着大包小包来了，一通张罗，小房间顿时温馨。俩人仿佛回到了少女时代，点了外卖吃吃喝喝，久违地聊了知心话，再无芥蒂。第二天，陈凯西陪着罗曼罗妈等在手术室门口，谢天谢地，结果是良性的。罗曼一直以来憋着的眼泪终于爆发。方驰攥在手里一张纸巾，没有递出去。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十八集 这不是心动吧 “美少女壮士“群里资讯不断，见不了面，大家经常开视频聊天：陈氏夫妇感情回温，就是陈勉天天想吃包子，陈凯西做得快吐了；钟倾城跑步看片，积极充电；罗曼忙着转发求助和辟谣，团购物资支援各地，只有偶尔和方驰的聊天，会让她跳出焦虑。局势稳定父母回家，临行前打听方驰情况，罗曼大惊：丧心病狂了吧！方驰才多大！不想父母是打算介绍给她表妹。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第十九集 斯人如彩虹 罗曼要搞定的帅哥医生就是方驰。没想到方驰以专心学习拒绝。方驰去露营，罗曼制造偶遇。方驰当做是约会，搭帐篷、生火做饭，上手就是三串一饼，罗曼将话题转到人生目标，试图用参加节目能提高自己的竞争力，与同门刘怡然竞争唯一留院名额，方驰反问她，妳的人生只有第一这个选项？罗曼从小被培养成夺冠赛犬，所有人只看她飞得多高，第一个关心她飞得累不累的，竟然是她以为的小孩，方驰。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 谢庭威卧底兰崖军团 三号车出警，锁匠拉杰正在和人吵架，对方被他推倒晕厥，拉杰被带回警署协助调查。上车前，拉杰告诉谢庭威，自己的父亲住院，急待汇钱救命，恳求谢庭威先放了自己，被庭威拒绝。晚上，谢庭威在自家餐厅看到新闻中提及，最近南亚裔给香港治安带来很大隐患，呼吁政府采取强硬措施。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 韦豪送钱迟了，振堂误会十七和桂婵不守约，迁怒于本已拿到通行证逃走的难民。韦豪赶到时，振堂已下令射杀一批难民，众人对他恨得咬牙切齿。四海偷偷拜祭死去的难民，更引发桂婵心中对振堂的愤恨，要与他拼个鱼死网破……回到租界，面对桂新串通六爷、八爷提出高价退股撤资，而四海极力想加入永业银行，桂婵统统回绝。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 暴徒打砸谢庭威中枪 救驾有功的谢庭威获得了巴朗的信任，何浩辉跟邵峰分析现在叫谢庭威归队有点可惜，会看紧庭威。何浩辉代替谢庭威到学校演讲，何乐轩十分骄傲。 关颖在棠哥家仍然和混混联系，凭借红姐对自己的喜爱管红姐要钱花。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 在混沌初开的世界中，真师虽神通广大却踪迹难寻。人羽两族长期争夺大陆统治权，战火不断。直到一名少年将军统合五族，建立大晁王朝。然而，夜北地区尚未被纳入大晁版图，各部族间争斗不息。夜北大渊古之女叶凌霜与朱颜公主七海蕊偷偷出游后回到部族，却受到不同的待遇。在秋选之日，突然出现的雪狼王引发混乱，大晁君主彧修明救下叶凌霜并欣赏她的勇气。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: Sleepless In Seattle
programme.desc: A widower's son calls a radio talk show in an attempt to find his father a partner.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Samuel Gerard and his team of Marshals are assigned to track down Sheridan, who has been accused of a double-murder.

programme.title: Ocean's Eleven
programme.desc: Less than 24 hours after being paroled, Danny Ocean handpicks a top-notch team of smooth operators to pocket $150 million in one night, in the most daring Las Vegas casino heist ever.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious
programme.desc: The Fast And The Furious is pure faced paced adrenaline-fuelled car action. A rookie cop goes undercover, posing as a racing team member to investigate a series of hijackings.

programme.title: Sleepless In Seattle
programme.desc: A widower's son calls a radio talk show in an attempt to find his father a partner.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Samuel Gerard and his team of Marshals are assigned to track down Sheridan, who has been accused of a double-murder.

programme.title: Ocean's Eleven
programme.desc: Less than 24 hours after being paroled, Danny Ocean handpicks a top-notch team of smooth operators to pocket $150 million in one night, in the most daring Las Vegas casino heist ever.

programme.title: Liar, Liar
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as a fast-talking attorney and habitual liar who, forced by his son's birthday wish, must tell the truth for the next 24 hours.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Executive Decision
programme.desc: In a chillingly prescient story, 400 terrified passengers face death on a plane hijacked by terrorists. In a daring rescue attempt, an elite military unit boards the plane ... but as they hurtle toward Washington, D.C., the president must decide whether to destroy the plane or allow the heroes time to overpower the terrorists.

programme.title: Dhanam - Ungalil Oruthi
programme.desc: A debt-ridden man's attempt to report smugglers for a reward backfires, leading to a dangerous pursuit as the criminals seek revenge on him.

programme.title: Kanmani Anbudan
programme.desc: Kanmani, a talented chef, falls for Anbu, heir to Raj Foods, while her actress friend Vennila also catches his eye. After an unexpected marriage, will Anbu accept Kanmani as his wife?

programme.title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
programme.desc: Ilamathi is stuck between a brave cop and a bad goon. This love triangle is dangerous. Can her heart handle the trouble? She must choose between the two men.

programme.title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare - Oru Chinanjiru Kuyilin Kadhai
programme.desc: A poetic drama about love, memory, and childhood emotions as characters grow. Simple moments reveal how love shapes memory, guiding growth through tender, evolving feelings.

programme.title: Siragadikka Aasai
programme.desc: Meena and Muthukumar, both carrying emotional baggage, struggle through challenges in their marriage due to their troubled backgrounds.

programme.title: Neeya Naana
programme.desc: A talk show with a difference - every week a topic is chosen and two groups of people representing extreme ends talk about their views.

programme.title: Blade: Trinity
programme.desc: Blade continues warring against the vampire nation in an attempt to save the world.

programme.title: It Chapter Two
programme.desc: 27 years after he was defeated, Pennywise is back to terrorize the town of Derry. Now adults, the Losers come back to destroy him once and for all.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: When their mobster husbands are sent to prison by the FBI, three New York housewives decide to continue their husbands' business on their own.

programme.title: Contagion
programme.desc: There is a deadly outbreak of a fatal disease and people are determined to keep it at bay.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Rachel McAdams and Harrison Ford star in this romantic comedy set in the hilarious and dysfunctional world of morning television.

programme.title: Kiss The Girls
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman is hunting down a serial killer, and his only clue is Ashley Judd, the only victim who managed to get away.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Unknown
programme.desc: A man awakens to find that his wife no longer recognizes him and that another man has assumed his identity.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Dusty and Brad have joined forces to provide their kids with the perfect Christmas. Things take a turn when their own dads arrive and throw the holiday into chaos.

programme.title: Life Support
programme.desc: An HBO Original Movie, Life Support tells the tale of an HIV-positive woman who learns lessons of love and strength through helping others.

programme.title: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: The story of Winston Churchill unfolds in this award winning HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: The Corruptor
programme.desc: East meets West in this hard-hitting tale of deception, violence and betrayal in New York City's Chinatown.

programme.title: The Little Things
programme.desc: Deputy Sheriff Joe Deacon is sent to Los Angeles for supposedly a quick assignment. Instead, he gets embroiled in the search for a serial killer terrorising the city.

programme.title: It Chapter Two
programme.desc: 27 years after he was defeated, Pennywise is back to terrorize the town of Derry. Now adults, the Losers come back to destroy him once and for all.

programme.title: Hellboy: The Crooked Man
programme.desc: Hellboy and a rookie BPRD agent get stranded in 1950s rural Appalachia, only to discover a small community haunted by witches, led by the Crooked Man.

programme.title: The Last Gunfight
programme.desc: In a ruthless underground tournament, the world's top assassins fight to the death.

programme.title: In Pursuit Of Honor
programme.desc: Don Johnson leads a group of men in the fight to save the cavalry's last horses from slaughter.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Rachel McAdams and Harrison Ford star in this romantic comedy set in the hilarious and dysfunctional world of morning television.

programme.title: Kiss The Girls
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman is hunting down a serial killer, and his only clue is Ashley Judd, the only victim who managed to get away.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: When an elite team of firefighters come to the rescue of three siblings, they quickly realise that no amount of training could prepare them for their most challenging job yet - babysitting.

programme.title: The Corruptor
programme.desc: East meets West in this hard-hitting tale of deception, violence and betrayal in New York City's Chinatown.

programme.title: Life Support
programme.desc: An HBO Original Movie, Life Support tells the tale of an HIV-positive woman who learns lessons of love and strength through helping others.

programme.title: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: The story of Winston Churchill unfolds in this award winning HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: Something The Lord Made
programme.desc: In this HBO Original movie, two men achieve an enormous medical breakthrough that earns one an award and the other, a painful lesson in unequal opportunity.

programme.title: John Carpenter's Escape From L.A.
programme.desc: Ex-convict Kurt Russell (who else!) battles his way through the hellholes of Los Angeles to retrieve a doomsday weapon.

programme.title: Downsizing
programme.desc: When scientists find a way to shrink humans to five inches tall, a couple decides to ditch their stressed out lives and downsize to live large in a luxurious community.

programme.title: iRocked the Vote
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie urge the iCarly fans to vote David Archuleta to victory on America Sings, they feel bad for the runner-up and help him make a music video. Meanwhile, Sam teaches Spencer how to lie like a pro.

programme.title: iMake Sam Girlier
programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: #BabySitterWar
programme.desc: When a babysitting client says, "You're my favorite babysitter ever", Sam and Cat debate which one of them he meant. They compete for their new clients' affection to see who really is the best babysitter.

programme.title: Bishop Makes Her Move
programme.desc: The origin of the woman called BISHOP! Why does she hate mutants? What is the secret of the Mechazoids? And exactly what happened the night the Turtles fell into Bishop's trap?

programme.title: Night Of The Mechazoids
programme.desc: The Turtles take the fight to Bishop but she's ready for them... get ready for MECHA-BIHSOP! But when the Mechazoids go out of control, can the Turtles save humanity?

programme.title: Plankton Paranoia / Library Cards
programme.desc: Plankton hasn't tried to steal the secret formula in a while...and that's making Mr. Krabs nervous! // When Patrick discovers the pineapple's library, SpongeBob introduces him to the wonderful world of book learning!

programme.title: Call the Cops! / Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence! SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. // Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: Get the Hump / Sing For Your Supper
programme.desc: It's Best to the rescue when Bester's phobia of camels threatens to de-rail her chances of being dance champ. // Best and Bester go busking, but will Best cope with competition and what happens when burgers and banjos collide?

programme.title: The Big Game / Get Your Skate On
programme.desc: Bester finds that the only way to get her brother's attention when he's glued to the game, is to be in the game. // Best and Bester stage a crazy publicity stunt for Grafifi's repair shop which has everyone fearing for their lives.

programme.title: The Dated Game / Ice Cream Headache
programme.desc: GrandPat competes for Granny Tentacles' love on a dating game show. // The Ice Cream Man and Ice Cream King team up to capture a mysterious ice cream eating beast.

programme.title: Two Pests in a Teapot / Partial Recall
programme.desc: When Granny Tentacles goes out for a spa day, Patrick and Squidina take care of her house. // After Plankton forgets who he is, the Dartfish family adopts him.

programme.title: Bubbletown / Girls' Night Out
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown... Bubbletown! // Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

programme.title: CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: Plankton clones SpongeBob in an effort to steal Krabs' secret formula, but original Bob might ruin his plans.

programme.title: Tide and Prejudice
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: Monsty
programme.desc: When Mika tries too hard to win Man's Nest Employee of The Month, she creates a monster that could ruin the telethon Danger Force is hosting.

programme.title: Holey Moley
programme.desc: The gang thinks they have found the perfect tunnels to access all of Swellview, until they are confronted by the tunnels' original inhabitants.

programme.title: Steeling Thunder / Be Careful What you Fish For
programme.desc: To win their school film festival, Lincoln and Clyde cast Lynn as their movie's extreme stunt double. // A fishing trip with Gramps turns into an obsessive chase when Gramps' old fish rival, Moby Rick, swims nearby.

programme.title: Fed Up / Shell Shock
programme.desc: Tired of monotonous meals, the kids make a plan to sabotage dinner so they can have pizza. // Lincoln and Ronnie Anne have to take care of an egg baby but Lincoln doesn't trust her with the fragile egg.

programme.title: Silence of the Luans
programme.desc: With Luan locked in a cell in the basement, who is responsible for the April Fool's Day pranks this year?

programme.title: Krusty Koncessionaires / Dream Hoppers
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab crew goes to a big concert to sell krabby patties in the stands. // SpongeBob explores the melodious dreamscapes of his sleeping neighbors.

programme.title: A Place for Pets / Lockdown for Love
programme.desc: When customers bring pets into the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs soon realizes pets are more profitable than owners. // Plankton ruins another date with Karen, so she puts the Chum Bucket on lockdown until he proves his affection.

programme.title: Tango Tangle
programme.desc: Plankton and Karen take dance lessons and quickly become the top of the class.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Flip This Flip / Haunted House Call
programme.desc: The Loud kids help Flip clean up his image to impress his middle school crush. // When the Mortician's Club can't afford tickets to Casket Con, they decide to start a business to raise money.

programme.title: Sound of Silence / Space Invader
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. // After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!

programme.title: Picture Perfect / Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the 'perfect' family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. // Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: Linc or Swim / Changing the Baby
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. // After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

programme.title: Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find "the big picture" as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: Woori World / Finding FlamingoFan85
programme.desc: The family prepares for war, AKA a trip to the local Asian market. After their battle to procure a rare cookie, Jack feels more part of the family. // The Groom & Board gets a bad review. Lily tries to find the culprit and "correct the record.

programme.title: Life Insurance / Burst Your Bubble
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger! // When SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town wants one! Everyone except Mrs. Puff, that is.

programme.title: Plankton Retires / Trident Trouble
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he's still up to no good. // When SpongeBob accidentally picks up Neptune's magic trident, there's no telling what trouble he may cause!

programme.title: Gas Station Vacation / Bunny the Barbarian
programme.desc: The Star Family heads to their favorite resort. // Bunny goes on a mid-day adventure to a forgotten age.

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: Present Danger / Stressed for the Part
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed. // After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: Study Muffin / Homespun
programme.desc: Lincoln gets a tutor that all his sisters instantly get crushes on, making it impossible for Lincoln to study. // The kids complain about their house, but when a tornado threatens to destroy it, they start to feel differently.

programme.desc: The Loud kids help Flip clean up his image to impress his middle school crush. // When the Mortician's Club can't afford tickets to Casket Con, they decide to start a business to raise money.

programme.desc: To win their school film festival, Lincoln and Clyde cast Lynn as their movie's extreme stunt double. // A fishing trip with Gramps turns into an obsessive chase when Gramps' old fish rival, Moby Rick, swims nearby.

programme.title: A Midsummer Night's Scheme
programme.desc: Max agrees to mentor Captain Perfect's younger sister, who is headed down the path of becoming a supervillain. But he has his hands full when she tries to become one of Mastermind's henchmen. Phoebe tries to help BC ask Chloe to the school dance.

programme.title: Cruel Summer
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe are working well as a team, until he is accused of committing crimes and Phoebe must apprehend him. Now on the lam, Max learns that the Mastermind's henchman is secretly controlling his actions via a chip in his neck.

programme.title: Mime Games
programme.desc: When Danger Force and Captain Man are called to Paris to protect France's national treasures, Bose is accidentally left alone to try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest.

programme.title: A Danger Among Us
programme.desc: After Miles has a vision that Rick Twitler is still around, Danger Force travels deep into the Man's Nest's to find him, running into an old foe along the way.

programme.title: Henry & The Woodpeckers
programme.desc: When Piper's basketball coach quits, Henry becomes the coach of Piper's team. As he tries to whip the team into shape, he is challenged by the League Board and its unorthodox rules.

programme.title: The App Came Back
programme.desc: Lay Lay's avatar creator visits Sadie with some changes to the app settings, turning Lay Lay's personality negative, while Sadie tries to restore her best friend's positivity and convince the techie not to shut down the app completely.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review

programme.title: Appetite for Destruction / Frame on You
programme.desc: When Lily starts misbehaving at home, Mom and Dad think her new preschool friends might be the cause. // When Rusty is wrongfully suspended, the Action News Team leaps into action to clear his name.

programme.title: Present Danger / Stressed for the Part
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed. // After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: Project Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln has to get to school on time but getting his sisters out the door proves to be the biggest obstacle of all.

programme.title: The Library
programme.desc: Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.title: Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: The Boba-Get / Be Your Own Bean
programme.desc: Lil's favorite boba shop is closing! The kids try to save the cafe using pucker limes, but are quickly forced to save Canyon Valley from the pucker. // Lil and Min both realize how similar they are to their moms and set out to distinguish themselves.

programme.title: FarmerBob / Gary & Spot
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick work a day on Old Man Jenkins' farm, much to his dismay. // Sandy narrates the nocturnal adventures of Gary and his secret pal - Spot.

programme.title: Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: The Nitwitting / The Ballad of Filthy Muck
programme.desc: Patrick inducts SpongeBob into his prestigious society of dullards and doofuses. // Patrick takes his grime to a new extreme, playing around in so much trash that he becomes unrecognizable.

programme.title: A Midsummer Night's Scheme

programme.title: Whistlin' Susie
programme.desc: After accidentally activating an atomic bomb in the Man Cave, Ray and Henry decide to drive it out into the Swellview desert in order to save their city.

programme.title: An Imposter Among Us
programme.desc: Rick Twitler returns with a new plan to control Mika's mind through a spooky VR video game. It's up to Danger Force to exer-cise the Rick Twitler out of Mika before they're all plunged back into the Dark Ages for good.

programme.title: iReunite With Missy
programme.desc: When Carly's old friend Missy moves back to Seattle, Sam believes Missy is trying to replace her as Carly's best friend.

programme.title: #GoomerSitting
programme.desc: When Sam and Cat agree to babysit Goomer while Dice goes away, they misapply Goomer's medication which causes him to temporarily lose his eyesight before a big match.

programme.title: Raph VS. Water
programme.desc: The Turtles and Mutanimals are caught in the Storm of the Century! But when a new group of SEA MUTANTS threaten the city... Raph will be forced to use his WORDS to save the day.

programme.title: Mikey Takes Charge
programme.desc: Mikey and Genghis Frog are sent into the storm on a supply run to the local market when they encounter the electrifying LEE THE EEL! Now Mikey has to step up and be a LEADER!

programme.title: International Series Japan Round 3
programme.desc: The Asian Tour is the principal men's professional golf tour in Asia except for Japan. Most of the leading players on the tour are Asian, but players from other parts of the world also participate.

programme.desc: The Asian Tour is the principal men's professional golf tour in Asia except for Japan. Most of the leading players on the tour are Asian, but players from other parts of the world also participate.

programme.title: Paltan
programme.desc: Lieutenant Colonel Raj Singh Yadav and his soldiers protect the Nathu La Pass from the Chinese while coping with the pain of being separated from their loved ones. Release Year: 2018 Director: J.P. Dutta Awards: 2019 Nominee Jury's Choice Award- Best Lyricist- Javed Akhtar

programme.title: Parmanu - The Story Of Pokhran
programme.desc: A look at India's second confidential nuclear test series at Pokhran led by Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam, during the time of PM Atal Bihari Vajpayee's tenure.

programme.desc: A tale of greed, betrayal and revenge as two brothers are pitted against each other! High stakes! Perfect murder! Release Year: 2008 Director: Abbas Burmawalla,Mustan Burmawalla

Release Year: 2019 Director: Tushar Hiranandani Awards: 2020 WinnerCritics' Awards- Best ActreSS- Bhumi Pednekar- Tied withTaapsee Pannu, 2020 WinnerCritics' Awards- Best ActreSS- Taapsee Pannu

programme.title: Coolie (1983)
programme.desc: An honest worker rises against injustice when powerful enemies exploit the poor. With courage and determination, he leads a fiery fight for dignity, justice and survival. Release Year: 1983 Director: Manmohan Desai, Prayag Raj

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: A corrupt police officer, works for Durva, an influential smuggler. However, his life takes an unusual turn when he decides to avenge a woman who was assaulted by Durva's brothers. Release Year: 2018 Director: Rohit Shetty Awards: 2019 Winner Bollywood BusineSS Award- Highest-GroSSing Actor- Ranveer Singh

programme.desc: Foghorn Leghorn attempts to charm his future father-in-law.
